productDisplayName: Disney Kids Girl's Check Pink Kidswear
description: Composition:100% cotton pink check Daisy blouseWashcare:Machine wash in cold water with a gentle cycle using mild detergent. Wash dark colours seperately. Do not bleach. Do not soak nor wring. Dry it inside out. Do not tumble dry. Do not iron on print and studs.Fitting:Comfort FitThis pink check blouse from disney is sure to bring a big smile on your little girl's face. Its pink peter pan collar with small puffed sleeves and Daisy embroidery on the front will make your princess look adorable.
